channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump says he "insisted that negotiations with Iran continue" during meeting with Netanyahu
item.description: President Trump met with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu at the White House Wednesday as U.S. officials hold indirect talks with Iran over i...

item.title: Nancy Guthrie case live updates: Man who was detained was under surveillance
item.description: More than a week after the suspected abduction of the mother of "Today" show anchor Savannah Guthrie, authorities detained and released a person after...

item.title: Breezy Johnson has plans for her repaired gold medal
item.description: Team USA star skier Breezy Johnson talks with CBS News about her broken Olympic medal, a superstition, and what keeps her motivated on the slopes.

item.title: Pentagon-FAA dispute over lasers to thwart cartel drones led to airspace closure, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

item.title: A new tax break on auto loan interest may help 4 million car owners
item.description: New deduction allows taxpayers to deduct up to $10,000 on interest they paid to buy a new American-made vehicle in 2025.

item.title: Lawyers of Chicago woman shot by federal agents say documents show how DHS lies about investigations
WATCH: 'Dawson's Creek' star James Van Der Beek dies at age 48
item.description: James Van Der Beek, the actor best known for starring in the teen TV drama "Dawson's Creek" and films including "Varsity Blues," has died. He was 48.

item.title: 'Dawson's Creek' star James Van Der Beek dies at age 48
item.description: Actor James Van Der Beek of “Dawson’s Creek” and “Varsity Blues fame has died at age 48.

item.title: FBI combs through thick desert terrain in search for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
Man questioned in Guthrie disappearance speaks out, says experience was 'terrifying'
item.description: The man who was questioned and released in the investigation into Nancy Guthrie's disappearance said the experience was 'terrifying.'

item.title: Dispute over Cardi B's Super Bowl cameo roils prediction markets
item.description: Cardi B appeared during Bad Bunny's halftime show at the Super Bowl, but one prediction market says it's unclear whether she sang.

item.title: WATCH: Bondi calls Rep. Raskin 'washed up, loser lawyer' in tense hearing
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi was being questioned by Democratic Rep. Jerry Nadler when she sparred with his Democratic colleague.

item.title: Bondi: DOJ "will of course unredact" mens' names in Epstein files that "should not have been" hidden
item.description: At a House hearing on Wednesday, Democratic Rep. Lou Correa of California criticized some of the redactions in the Justice Department's files on convi...
